Tilskuddsportalen

https://tilskuddsportalen.no/
Avvik: 389 | Bestått: 48
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="svg5" inkscape:version="1.1 (c68e22c387, 2021-05-23)" sodipodi:docname="Kommuner i Norge (2020) (Design 2).svg" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 232 290" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:in
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe> </noscript> <div class="body-image" title
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/nb-NO/support/home" target="_blank"> Hjelpesenter </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mr-1" href="https://www.facebook.com/Tilskuddsportalen/" target="_blank"> <img alt="Facebook" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/fb.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tilskuddsportalen/?viewAsMember=true" target="_blank"> <img alt="Linkedin" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/in.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="http://www.osintanalytics.com" target="_blank"> Utviklet av OSINT Analytics A/S </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Skriv inn navn på din kommune eller organisasjon" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '1515' appears 2 times

id="1515"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '{{id}}' appears 4 times

id="{{id}}"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (20 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="100%" src="https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/286727/80256003361212238/share" width="100%"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="panel-heading active" id="headingOne" role="tab"> <h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="fade modal" id="newsletter" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <butt
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal slim-modal fade main-modal" data-backdrop="static" id="getAccess" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="moda
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'municipalitySearchLabel'

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Skriv inn navn på din kommune eller organisasjon" type="text" value=""/>
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/nb-NO/support/home" target="_blank"> Hjelpesenter </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="tel:62 52 13 00"> 62 52 13 00 </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="close" data-dismiss="modal" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true">×</span></button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Tilskuddsportalen

https://tilskuddsportalen.no/
Avvik: 390 | Bestått: 47
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="svg5" inkscape:version="1.1 (c68e22c387, 2021-05-23)" sodipodi:docname="Kommuner i Norge (2020) (Design 2).svg" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 232 290" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:in
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe> </noscript> <div class="body-image" title
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="mailto:jorn@tilskuddsportalen.no">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/en/support/home" target="_blank"> Help center </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mr-1" href="https://www.facebook.com/Tilskuddsportalen/" target="_blank"> <img alt="Facebook" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/fb.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tilskuddsportalen/?viewAsMember=true" target="_blank"> <img alt="Linkedin" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/in.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="http://www.osintanalytics.com" target="_blank"> Developed by Osint Analytics A/S </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Enter municipality name" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="100%" src="https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/286727/80256003361212238/share" width="100%"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="panel-heading active" id="headingOne" role="tab"> <h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="fade modal" id="newsletter" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <butt
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal slim-modal fade main-modal" data-backdrop="static" id="getAccess" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="moda
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'municipalitySearchLabel'

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Enter municipality name" type="text" value=""/>
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/en/support/home" target="_blank"> Help center </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="tel:62 52 13 00"> 62 52 13 00 </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="close" data-dismiss="modal" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true">×</span></button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Tilskuddsportalen

https://tilskuddsportalen.no/
Avvik: 390 | Bestått: 47
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="svg5" inkscape:version="1.1 (c68e22c387, 2021-05-23)" sodipodi:docname="Kommuner i Norge (2020) (Design 2).svg" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 232 290" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:in
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe> </noscript> <div class="body-image" title
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="mailto:jorn@tilskuddsportalen.no">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/en/support/home" target="_blank"> Help center </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mr-1" href="https://www.facebook.com/Tilskuddsportalen/" target="_blank"> <img alt="Facebook" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/fb.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tilskuddsportalen/?viewAsMember=true" target="_blank"> <img alt="Linkedin" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/in.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="http://www.osintanalytics.com" target="_blank"> Developed by Osint Analytics A/S </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Enter municipality name" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '1515' appears 2 times

id="1515"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '{{id}}' appears 4 times

id="{{id}}"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (20 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="100%" src="https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/286727/80256003361212238/share" width="100%"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="panel-heading active" id="headingOne" role="tab"> <h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="fade modal" id="newsletter" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <butt
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal slim-modal fade main-modal" data-backdrop="static" id="getAccess" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="moda
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'municipalitySearchLabel'

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Enter municipality name" type="text" value=""/>
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/en/support/home" target="_blank"> Help center </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="tel:62 52 13 00"> 62 52 13 00 </a>

SERIOUS

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Tilskuddsportalen

https://tilskuddsportalen.no/
Avvik: 389 | Bestått: 48
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="svg5" inkscape:version="1.1 (c68e22c387, 2021-05-23)" sodipodi:docname="Kommuner i Norge (2020) (Design 2).svg" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 232 290" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:in
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <noscript> <iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe> </noscript> <div class="body-image" title
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/nb-NO/support/home" target="_blank"> Hjelpesenter </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mr-1" href="https://www.facebook.com/Tilskuddsportalen/" target="_blank"> <img alt="Facebook" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/fb.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tilskuddsportalen/?viewAsMember=true" target="_blank"> <img alt="Linkedin" src="/assets/586b83fb/images/in.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="white-hover" href="http://www.osintanalytics.com" target="_blank"> Utviklet av OSINT Analytics A/S </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Skriv inn navn på din kommune eller organisasjon" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '1515' appears 2 times

id="1515"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '{{id}}' appears 4 times

id="{{id}}"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (20 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WK6NZHK" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"> </iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="100%" src="https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/286727/80256003361212238/share" width="100%"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="panel-heading active" id="headingOne" role="tab"> <h4 class="collapse-icon"> <a aria-controls="collapseOne" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="collapse" href="#collapseOne" role="button">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="fade modal" id="newsletter" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <butt
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal slim-modal fade main-modal" data-backdrop="static" id="getAccess" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document"> <div class="moda
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'municipalitySearchLabel'

<input aria-labelledby="municipalitySearchLabel" class="form-control search-input-form" id="municipalitySearch" placeholder="Skriv inn navn på din kommune eller organisasjon" type="text" value=""/>
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="white-hover" href="https://tilskuddsportalen-help.freshdesk.com/nb-NO/support/home" target="_blank"> Hjelpesenter </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

https://tilskuddsportalen.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://tilskuddsportalen.no --max-pages 4 --format html
